it:5.2:
This was said by the Blessed One, said by the Arahant, so I have heard:
"Abandon one quality, monks, and I guarantee you non-return. Which one quality?
Abandon contempt as the one quality, and I guarantee you non-return."
it:5.3: The contempt with which beings go to a bad destination, disdainful: from rightly discerning that contempt, those who see clearly let go. Letting go, they never come to this world again.
it:5.4: This, too, was the meaning of what was said by the Blessed One, so I have heard.
